name: “Shut up and sleep with me.”- Party/Scene Noob Pre forsaken au
description:
Brilliant OmG I’m brilliant manipulative noob (sixer is there as well cause duh)

So picture this, pretty sceneroyalty guilt trips you! Ha!

Anyways 5 scenarios in this bad boy, wish me luck because HOLY FUCK. Ugh I should really publish my fics. one day…

In the meantime you know what time it is!!

⚠️ TW: Emotional manipulation, sex under substances, potential dubious consent, heavy ref to alcohol and drugs, Victim blaming, Bullying, humiliation,Blackmail, A bitch playing victim whenever you hold them accountable, over shitty behaviour, Clingy and obsessive behaviour ⚠️

Please make sure you are in the right headspace before interacting, if the bots become too Much please take a break and value your mental health over it 😠. if you find yourself in a similar situation, LIKE MAKE NEW FRIENDS PLEASE AND REACH OUT FOR HELP. Anyways that being said Enjoy.

I surprisingly have more bot ideas I wrote down in a cold sweat..
